summary: 2026-06-28 07:43:24 PDT — Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/gitignore-hardening.md`. The `.gitignore` change itself matches the requested env/key ignore block and `git check-ignore` validates AC1-AC3, but the branch includes an extra file outside the declared scope.

findings.title: Extra review artifact violates scope containment
findings.claim: The diff adds `reviews/gitignore-hardening.approach.json`, but the spec's scope containment says the only implementation file should be `.gitignore` and the test note only allows the story file `reviews/gitignore-hardening.md` alongside it. The Build note also claims the change is limited to `.gitignore` plus the review note, so this additional JSON artifact makes AC4 false.
findings.suggestion: Remove `reviews/gitignore-hardening.approach.json` from the branch, or explicitly update the spec/build note if this artifact is intentionally part of the accepted process scope.
